title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 29th January 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Flat results; near 52-week low, hold for post-Budget infra push
recommendations.detail: Somany's results were flat - top line and bottom line both flat with no big improvement, so no need to average now. Maybe hold for the Budget; if there is an infra push, building/construction/infra companies are likely to rise post-Budget. It is closer to the 52-week low, so it's not the time to sell.

recommendations.note: Good Q3, semiconductor play; hold, upside on level crossing
recommendations.detail: December/third-quarter result was good - top line rose, bottom line sustained, and capex is completing. It is one of the first blocks in the semiconductor space. Once the stock crosses back over the 620-630 levels, it may go all the way to 750-770. Definitely hold.

recommendations.note: No fresh buying near 52-wk high; trim after interim dividend
recommendations.detail: PSU refiners benefited from Russian oil and sustained refining margins, but US pressure may slowly erode that. Last two quarters' results were good and the stock is close to its 52-week high, but he would not suggest fresh buying. With the 100% interim dividend already announced/approved, he suggests reducing the position a bit after the dividend.

recommendations.note: Don't take a gold loan to invest; use savings only
recommendations.detail: A viewer wanted to pledge his gold for a Rs 16 lakh loan to invest in Gold BeES. Kutumba Rao said no - never invest with borrowed money, use only savings. If gold corrects (possible within six months to a year) the leveraged position is risky; understand that risk before acting.

recommendations.note: Good results, holding above 1000; book if bought just before results
recommendations.detail: Results were good. The stock is holding above 1,000 and corrected after touching its 52-week high of 1,141. Those who bought just before the results (after the last quarter) can book profit, only that - there's nothing to be afraid of. The CDMO segment disappointed a little quarter-on-quarter.

recommendations.note: Hold all infra ahead of Budget; Dec results awaited
recommendations.detail: He said to compulsorily hold all infra stocks ahead of the Budget, as it is a sector the government must address. Fundamentally a good counter, no doubt. September results were soft due to monsoon (lower execution); December results are still awaited but likely better with no monsoon. If asked, hold.
